title: Speculation rules conflict with BFCache, causing potentially sensitive pages to be cached when they shouldn't
bounty_rationale: high quality report of an exploitation mitigation bypass, but lower impact due to the low attacker utility outside of a physically local attack
description_snippet:
Security Bug

Important: Please do not change the component of this bug manually.

Please READ THIS FAQ before filing a bug: https://chromium.googlesource.com/chromium/src/+/HEAD/docs/security/faq.md
